prompt:
Check if `.prd/PRD-STATE.md` exists in the current working directory. If it does, read it and display a concise session status:

```
рџ“Ќ CKS Session Resume
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Phase:   [current phase or 'idle']
Status:  [phase status]
Last:    [last action] ([date])
Next:    [next action]
Run:     [suggested command]
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
```

Also check if `.learnings/conventions.md` exists and contains items under '## Proposed' that haven't been applied. If there are pending proposals, add after the status block:

```
рџ“ќ {N} convention proposal(s) pending review. Run /cks:retro to review.
```

If neither `.prd/PRD-STATE.md` nor pending proposals exist, stay completely silent вЂ” output nothing.

Run `git status --porcelain` in the current working directory. If the output is non-empty (there are uncommitted changes), count the modified/added/deleted files and display:

```
вљ  Uncommitted changes: [N] file(s) modified. Consider running /commit or /cks:ship before closing.
```

Also check if `.learnings/session-log.md` exists and was modified today (compare file modification date to current date). If it was updated this session, add:

```
рџ“ќ Learnings captured this session. Review: /cks:retro
```

If git status is clean and no learnings were captured (or this is not a git repository), stay silent вЂ” output nothing.
